title: ericoides glanduliferum
intro: Ericoides glanduliferum, also known as the 'glandular ericoid', is a shrub native to Australia, belonging to the family Epacridaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of essential oils and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Ericoides glanduliferum include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and potentially alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it can also be applied topically to the skin in the form of a salve or cream.
